sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75959" key="ou)ranofa/ntwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰνο-φάντωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shining up to heaven</tr_>; or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disclosing heaven</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
